rule: HP restoration should cap at max HP and preserve target/source semantics.
currentEvidence: ActorEngine.applyHealing is central, but HealingMechanics, DamageApp, GM service, Force/talent plans, and legacy sheet paths also update HP or call different wrappers.

rule: First Aid heals character level plus margin over DC 15; Surgery heals Constitution bonus minimum 1 times level; Critical Care heals level plus margin over DC 20.
currentEvidence: GMCombatRecoveryService TREAT_INJURY_WORKFLOWS use fixed default amounts like 5, 10, and 1.

rule: First Aid requires Medpac; Surgery requires Surgery Kit; Revivify and poison/disease/radiation treatment require Medical Kit; Repair requires Tool Kit.
currentEvidence: Medical gear exists in equipment compendiums, but current healing/repair workflows do not reliably check or consume gear.
automationBoundary: assist while gear is nominal; automate when gear tracking is enabled

rule: A target can benefit from a Medpac/First Aid once per 24 hours, and the Medpac is expended even on failed checks.
currentEvidence: HealingMechanics marks lastFirstAid, but GM workflow does not appear to honor that flag; item consumption is not implemented.
automationBoundary: automate cooldown; assist/automate consumption based on gear tracking setting

rule: Surgery failure by 5 or more deals damage equal to Damage Threshold and can kill a 0 HP target unless Force Point rescue applies.
currentEvidence: HealingMechanics.performSurgery directly computes newHP and uses updateActor rather than ActorEngine.applyDamage; DT source path may be noncanonical.

rule: A living creature with 8 uninterrupted hours of rest heals character level HP, cannot naturally heal with persistent conditions, and only benefits once per 24 hours.
currentEvidence: RecoveryMechanics is houserule-driven by hit die/custom formulas and does not clearly block persistent conditions or track a 24-hour natural-healing cooldown.
automationBoundary: automate if RAW recovery enabled; allow houserule replacement

rule: DC 20 Mechanics after 1 hour repairs a damaged/Disabled Droid for HP equal to Droid character level and removes Persistent Conditions.
currentEvidence: GM repair workflows use fixed amounts and ActorEngine.applyHealing; droid operational state restoration exists when HP becomes positive.
automationBoundary: automate formula/check result; GM manage duration/facility unless tracked

rule: DC 20 Mechanics after 1 hour repairs object/vehicle for 1d8 HP and removes Persistent Conditions; onboard vehicle CT penalties apply.
currentEvidence: GM repair workflows support droid/vehicle repair but use fixed amounts and do not represent object repair or onboard CT penalties.
automationBoundary: assist/automate formula; GM manage facility/location context

rule: Organic healing and droid/vehicle repair are different applications with different skills, gear, and target eligibility.
currentEvidence: GM service gates Heal vs Repair, but ActorEngine.applyHealing itself only blocks destroyed droids and otherwise accepts HP restoration for any actor.
automationBoundary: preserve target-kind in workflow packet; low-level mutation can stay generic if higher-level gates are mandatory

rule: Healing Force powers should apply HP/condition recovery according to their DC tiers.
currentEvidence: ForcePowerEffectsEngine._buildHealingEffect returns [] with comment that healing powers heal HP when used; no visible HP mutation in that builder.
automationBoundary: automate after force power result; GM pick target if needed

rule: Drain-heal effects combine damage dealt to target with healing to source and should preserve damage/healing context.
currentEvidence: TalentEffectEngine Dark Healing plan builders calculate new HP values and mutations directly rather than routing target damage through damage resolution and source healing through healing authority.
automationBoundary: automate packet math; GM manage target legality when needed

rule: Bonus HP from multiple sources does not stack; use the larger pool and remove remaining Bonus HP at encounter end.
currentEvidence: ActorEngine damage can track system.hp.bonus, and Bolster Ally/temp HP mechanics exist, but source comparison and encounter cleanup need verification.
